change_scope: Added direction (str), confidence (float), event_type (str) to TriageResult dataclass + FLASH_TRIAGE_SYSTEM_PROMPT + triage_batch parsing. All fields have safe defaults (neutral/0.5/unknown).

findings.title: direction string not enum-validated
findings.detail: direction accepts any string, default 'neutral'. LLM could output non-standard values. Downstream Pre-Act planner uses direction as-is. If LLM outputs 'sideways' or 'mixed', it may confuse Pro analysis.
findings.recommendation: Accept for now; add enum validation (bullish|bearish|neutral) in a follow-up if Pro analysis shows confusion.

verified_safe: No new imports or external calls
